It depends... effects poops have to be done with class and style; it's not about just cramming a bunch of Vegas affects into a scene, it's about making them subtly funny, absurd, or of some other merit (see: "the king" by Madanonymous). Good story poops  should have good sentence mixing/word splicing, a cliche-less "plot" (no "The King wants to make toast for dinner ololo"), and some of the creator's creativity.

But enough pedantry. This poop is epic.
